text_block_list.text:
I go looking for Taiki Shuttle, who has yet to turn
up for training...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: There ya are, Trainer! Finally! C'mon, let's go!
choice_data_list: I've been looking all over for you!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Is this that telepathy thing? Our hearts
must be beatin' to the same drum or something!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Anyhoo, let's get to the finish line!

Taiki goes speeding off, leaving me no choice but
to chase after her...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Taiki's amazing! She's first again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. You can bet your bottom dollar on that!
Scavenger hunt or what—I ain't fixin' to lose!
choice_data_list: Playing hooky for a game, are we?
Playing hooky for a game, are we?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yikes! You look madder than a wet hen!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But game or not, it's a competition, and I play to
win!

Apparently, Taiki was tasked with finding
someone really reliable for her scavenger hunt.
...I suppose I don't need to scold her for that long.
